sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_arrays (id Int32, values Array(Int32), conditions String);
INSERT INTO test_arrays (id, values, conditions) VALUES (1, [1, 2, NULL, 4], 'test1'), (2, [5, 6, 7, 8], 'test2');
SELECT id, arrayFold(acc, x -> acc + x, values) AS total FROM test_arrays WHERE conditions LIKE 'test%';
SELECT id, arrayFold(acc, x -> (acc.1, acc.2 + x), values, (0, 0)) AS fibo FROM (SELECT id, arrayMap(x -> x * 2, values) AS double_values FROM test_arrays) AS temp WHERE double_values LIKE '%8%';
SELECT id, arrayFold(acc, x -> acc + cast(x AS String), values) AS concatenated FROM test_arrays GROUP BY id HAVING concatenated LIKE '1%' ORDER BY total DESC;
CREATE TABLE test_conditions (key Int32, val Nullable(Int32));
INSERT INTO test_conditions (key, val) VALUES (1, 10), (2, NULL), (3, 20);
SELECT A.key, arrayFold(acc, x -> acc + ifIsNull(x, 0, x), [val, val, val], 0) AS sum_val FROM test_conditions AS A WHERE val LIKE '2' GROUP BY A.key;
WITH (arrayFold(acc, x -> acc + x, [0, 1, 2, NULL])) AS result SELECT result WHERE result LIKE '%3';
CREATE TABLE temp_join (id Int32, value String);
SELECT j.id, arrayFold(acc, x -> acc * 2, values, 1) AS doubled_sum FROM temp_join AS j JOIN test_arrays AS t ON j.id = t.id WHERE t.values LIKE '[1, 2, NULL]';
